name: GCP Database Migration
description: Migration from Airtable to Google Cloud Platform (Cloud SQL via Cloud Run API). Phase 1 (data migration) and Airtable disconnection COMPLETE. Phase 2 (business logic microservices), Phase 3 (Next.js frontend), and Phase 4 (platform services) are IN PROGRESS.
milestones_completed: dataAccess.jsw rewritten for Cloud Run + Wix only
configData.js usesAirtable() stubbed to return false
5 backend services migrated from airtableClient to dataAccess
20 seed files and 20 connection test files deleted
Phase 4: search extensions installed (pg_trgm, postgis, pgvector, unaccent)
Phase 4: tsvector columns added to carriers and airtable_driver_profiles
Phase 4: collection, files, search, jobs route modules wired to Cloud Run API

search_fulltext.notes: pg_trgm + tsvector on carriers and driver profiles; GET /v1/search/carriers

vector_embeddings.notes: pgvector extension + document_embeddings table; embedding upsert via Cloud Run

file_storage.notes: GCS signed-URL generation via POST /v1/files/signed-url; driver-documents bucket

observability_bigquery.notes: BigQuery streaming to ldmr-velocitymatch.lmdr_analytics; x-trace-id on all responses

regression_tests.notes: phase4-smoke.test.js — 11 cases covering health, search, files, jobs, auth, trace headers
